cases.label: happy_path

input.strategy_route: Promote a software service around website building using trust-first messaging and a booking CTA
input.offer_info: website route, no zero-risk claims, clear scope framing
input.audience_segment: local businesses dealing with websites, launch deadlines and digital upgrades

mustInclude: trust and process proof before price
CTA that collects scope and timing

cases.label: edge_case

input.strategy_route: Write copy for trust-sensitive first-time visitors
input.offer_info: service-proof-first route with no zero-risk phrasing
input.audience_segment: users worried about delivery, data risk and software reliability

mustInclude: CTA that collects concern and visit window
